response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed as 8+ years, his recent work at re:cinq and open-source contributions suggest relevant expertise. His leadership in technical workshops and mentoring aligns with the role's requirements, though deeper cloud-specific AI experience could strengthen his candidacy.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and modern AI-agent frameworks (e.g., MCP).
Proven leadership in technical discovery and mentoring through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse background in scalable systems, real-time data pipelines, and cross-platform development.
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly quantified as 8+ years in production-grade solutions.
Limited explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or cloud-specific AI deployments (AWS/GCP/Azure).
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science is from an unconventional institution (Indian Institute of Technology Bombay), which may require verification.
